description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage build_stage. Use a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq gcc g++ libprotobuf-dev protobuf-compiler cmake bc python swig. Add a build_kernel_script job in the build_stage that executes: wget https://www.kernel.org/pub/linux/kernel/v4.x/linux-4.13.10.tar.gz; tar zxf linux-4.13.10.tar.gz; pushd .; cd linux-4.13.10; make defconfig; make modules_prepare; popd; uname -a; ./configure --kernbuilddir $(pwd)/linux-4.13.10 --no-user; make ker; make ker_install. Add a build_user_script job also in build_stage that runs: ./configure --no-kernel; make usr; make test; make usr_install. No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
